title: Our governance
body: "Our board  The board is responsible for advising on shaping the strategic direction of Skills England and ensuring it delivers on its vision. The board provides independent insight, challenge, and support to the executive team.  Membership    Phil Smith CBE, Chair  Sir David Bell, Vice Chair  Dr Fiona Aldridge, Board member  Dr Fazal Dad CBE, Board member  Sian Elliott, Board member  Nicki Hay MBE, Board member  Brian Holliday, Board member  Anthony Impey MBE, Board member  Dame Fiona Kendrick, Board member  Zoe Lewis CBE, Board member  Sara Todd, Board member  Andy Westwood, Board member  Helen Woodward Davies, Board member  Tessa Griffiths CBE, Chief Executive Officer (jobshare)  Sarah Maclean CBE, Chief Executive Officer (jobshare)  Gemma Marsh, Deputy Chief Executive Officer  "
